headline.interpretation_note: The weighted mean is dominated by FFN kernels which GRC does not touch. The GRC-affected kernel (gemv_q4_k grid=512, attention projection) shows +4.68pp improvement (7.47% -> 12.15%), consistent with the attention working set (~10 MB) fitting inside the 32 MB L2. The weighted average is an inappropriate metric for testing the attention-specific cache-fit prediction.

attention_specific.interpretation: CONFIRMED: attention working set L2 residency improved at k=1024

ffn_kernel_for_reference.interpretation: EXPECTED FLAT: GRC does not compress FFN
